summary: Iteration 95: Similar Products, Data Freshness & Score Consistency Testing. All 13 backend tests PASSED. Frontend testing PASSED - all new features visible and working correctly. Similar Products shows 6 product cards, DataFreshnessBadge shows source (TikTok Trends) and update time, DataFreshnessCard shows detailed refresh info. Score consistency FIX VERIFIED: overall_score now matches launch_score (42), recommendation correctly shows 'risky_caution'.

minor.issue: validation_summary text still references old dynamic score (72) instead of authoritative launch_score (42). The actual overall_score field is correct (42).

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/products/{id}/similar returns 200 with correct structure
BACKEND: Similar products contain required fields (id, product_name, launch_score, margin_percent, last_updated)
BACKEND: Similar products limit parameter works (returns <= limit)
BACKEND: Data freshness summary has correct structure (total_products, sources, refresh_schedule)
BACKEND: Data freshness sources have required fields (source, count, latest_update)
BACKEND: Refresh schedule contains expected keys (scores, trending_data)
BACKEND: Product has launch_score (42) in DB
BACKEND: Intelligence overall_score (42) MATCHES product launch_score (42)
BACKEND: Product detail includes data freshness fields (last_updated, data_source)
FRONTEND: Login works with reviewer@trendscout.click credentials
FRONTEND: Product detail page loads at /product/{id}
FRONTEND: DataFreshnessBadge VISIBLE with source (TikTok Trends) and update time (10m ago)
FRONTEND: Similar Products section VISIBLE with 6 similar product cards
FRONTEND: DataFreshnessCard VISIBLE with source, type, last updated, scores refreshed
FRONTEND: Launch Score 42 displayed consistently in stats and recommendation card
FRONTEND: Recommendation shows 'Risky — Proceed with Caution' correctly
action_items: MINOR: Update validation_summary text generation in ProductValidationEngine to use launch_score instead of dynamically computed score (currently shows '72/100' but overall_score is correctly 42)
critical_code_review_comments: Score consistency fix in intelligence.py (lines 132-149) correctly uses authoritative launch_score from DB
Similar Products endpoint correctly returns products in same category sorted by launch_score
Data Freshness components properly display source badges and update timestamps
Frontend correctly routes /product/:id to ProductDetailPage with all new sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Similar Products, Data Freshness, and Score Consistency features all working. Product detail page is at /product/{id} NOT /trending/{id}. The validation_summary text in intelligence endpoint still mentions old score (72) but actual overall_score field correctly shows 42. WebSocket notification connections fail (403) but this is pre-existing and doesn't affect core functionality.

displays: Source badge (TikTok Trends, Amazon Movers, etc)
